entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange and liquidity protocol built around dynamic-distribution automated market makers, spot swaps, configurable liquidity positions, incentive voting, and developer contracts.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation describes Maverick as an active spot-swap DEX and liquidity protocol. The live V2 interface supports token swaps, liquidity provisioning, boosted positions, voting, portfolio management, pool creation, and incentives. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Introducing Maverick
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Maverick as decentralized-finance infrastructure powered by a dynamic-distribution AMM and states that its dApp supports spot swaps and liquidity provision.

evidence.title: The Maverick V2 UI
evidence.notes: First-party V2 interface documentation describes current swap, liquidity, boosted-position, voting, portfolio, pool-creation, and incentive-management functions.
